1→---
     2→# Ploy Development Environment Setup Playbook
     3→# 
     4→# This playbook sets up a complete development environment including:
     5→# - Development tools (Go, Node.js, Java, Python)
     6→# - Build tools (KraftKit, Cosign, Syft, Grype)
     7→# - Container runtime (Docker)
     8→# - Object storage (SeaweedFS)
     9→# - Proper PATH configuration to avoid conflicts
    10→# - GitHub credentials setup for the ploy user
    11→#
    12→# Key improvements:
    13→# - Fixed PATH configuration to prevent multiple conflicting declarations
    14→# - Cosign installation with verification
    15→# - Cleanup of conflicting environment variables
    16→#
    17→- name: Setup Ploy Development Environment
    18→  hosts: linux_hosts
    19→  become: true
    20→  vars_files:
    21→    - ../vars/main.yml
    22→    - ../vars/dev-wildcard.yml
    23→  
    24→  tasks:
    25→    - name: Create ploy user first
    26→      user:
    27→        name: ploy
    28→        shell: /bin/bash
    29→        create_home: true
    30→        home: /home/ploy
    31→        groups: sudo
    32→        append: true
    33→
    34→    # CRITICAL: Create all Ploy directories early to prevent service startup failures
    35→    - name: Create comprehensive Ploy directory structure
    36→      file:
    37→        path: "{{ item.path }}"
    38→        state: directory
    39→        owner: "{{ item.owner }}"
    40→        group: "{{ item.group }}"
    41→        mode: "{{ item.mode }}"
    42→      loop:
    43→        - { path: "/opt/ploy", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    44→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/artifacts", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    45→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/metadata", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    46→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/debug", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    47→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/logs", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    48→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/cache", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    49→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/temp", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    50→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/traefik-data", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    51→        - { path: "/opt/ploy/traefik-data/certificates", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    52→        - { path: "/home/ploy/ploy", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    53→        - { path: "/home/ploy/ploy/configs", owner: "ploy", group: "ploy", mode: "0755" }
    54→
    55→    - name: Update system packages
    56→      block:
    57→        - name: Check if apt is locked
    58→          shell: lsof /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend /var/lib/dpkg/lock /var/cache/apt/archives/lock 2>/dev/null | wc -l
    59→          register: apt_locked
    60→          changed_when: false
    61→
    62→        - name: Wait for apt locks to be released
    63→          wait_for:
    64→            path: /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend
    65→            state: absent
    66→            timeout: 300
    67→          when: apt_locked.stdout|int > 0
    68→
    69→        - name: Update package cache
    70→          apt:
    71→            update_cache: true
    72→            cache_valid_time: 3600
    73→          retries: 3
    74→          delay: 10
    75→
    76→        - name: Upgrade system packages
    77→          apt:
    78→            upgrade: dist
    79→            force_apt_get: true
    80→          async: 1200  # 20 minutes max
    81→          poll: 30     # Check every 30 seconds
    82→          retries: 2
    83→          delay: 30
    84→      rescue:
    85→        - name: Handle package update failure
    86→          debug:
    87→            msg: "Package update failed but continuing with deployment. Check system later."
    88→      when: ansible_os_family == "Debian"
    89→
    90→    - name: Install basic development tools
    91→      apt:
    92→        name: "{{ testing_tools }}"
    93→        state: present
    94→      when: ansible_os_family == "Debian"
    95→      
    96→    - name: Install essential Ubuntu 24 dependencies
    97→      apt:
    98→        name:
    99→          - curl
   100→          - wget
   101→          - git
   102→          - vim
   103→          - snapd
   104→          - htop
   105→          - net-tools
   106→          - unzip
   107→          - jq
   108→          - ripgrep
   109→          - fd-find
   110→          - bat
   111→          - tree
   112→          - ncdu
   113→          - tmux
   114→          - screen
   115→          - python3-docker  # Required for Ansible Docker module
   116→          - python3-requests  # Required for URI module
   117→        state: present
   118→
   119→    - name: Install Docker prerequisites
   120→      apt:
   121→        name:
   122→          - apt-transport-https
   123→          - ca-certificates
   124→          - gnupg
   125→          - lsb-release
   126→          - software-properties-common
   127→        state: present
   128→
   129→    - name: Add Docker GPG key
   130→      apt_key:
   131→        url: https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg
   132→        state: present
   133→
   134→    - name: Add Docker repository
   135→      apt_repository:
   136→        repo: "deb [arch=amd64] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu {{ ansible_distribution_release }} stable"
   137→        state: present
   138→
   139→    - name: Install Docker
   140→      apt:
   141→        name:
   142→          - docker-ce
   143→          - docker-ce-cli
   144→          - containerd.io
   145→          - docker-buildx-plugin
   146→        state: present
   147→
   148→    - name: Add ploy user to docker group
   149→      user:
   150→        name: ploy
   151→        groups: docker
   152→        append: true
   153→
   154→    - name: Enhanced Docker service management
   155→      block:
   156→        - name: Check Docker service status
   157→          command: systemctl is-active docker
   158→          register: docker_service_status
   159→          ignore_errors: true
   160→          changed_when: false
   161→
   162→        - name: Check Docker service health if running
   163→          command: docker info
   164→          register: docker_info_check
   165→          ignore_errors: true
   166→          changed_when: false
   167→          when: docker_service_status.stdout == "active"
   168→
   169→        - name: Start and enable Docker service
   170→          systemd:
   171→            name: docker
   172→            state: started
   173→            enabled: true
   174→            daemon_reload: true
   175→          when: docker_service_status.stdout != "active"
   176→          register: docker_start_result
   177→          retries: 3
   178→          delay: 5
   179→          until: docker_start_result is succeeded
   180→
   181→        - name: Wait for Docker socket to be available
   182→          wait_for:
   183→            path: /var/run/docker.sock
   184→            state: present
   185→            timeout: 30
   186→          when: docker_service_status.stdout != "active" or docker_info_check is failed
   187→
   188→        - name: Verify Docker is responding
   189→          command: docker version
   190→          register: docker_version_check
   191→          retries: 3
   192→          delay: 5
   193→          until: docker_version_check.rc == 0
   194→          changed_when: false
   195→
   196→    - name: Setup Docker Registry for local image management
   197→      block:
   198→        - name: Create registry directory
   199→          file:
   200→            path: /var/lib/docker-registry
   201→            state: directory
   202→            mode: '0755'
   203→            owner: root
   204→            group: root
   205→        
   206→        - name: Pull Docker Registry image
   207→          docker_image:
   208→            name: registry:2
   209→            source: pull
   210→          retries: 3
   211→          delay: 10
   212→
   213→        - name: Run Docker Registry container
   214→          docker_container:
   215→            name: registry
   216→            image: registry:2
   217→            state: started
   218→            restart_policy: always
   219→            ports:
   220→              - "5000:5000"
   221→            volumes:
   222→              - /var/lib/docker-registry:/var/lib/registry
   223→            env:
   224→              REGISTRY_STORAGE_DELETE_ENABLED: "true"
   225→            healthcheck:
   226→              test: ["CMD", "wget", "--quiet", "--tries=1", "--spider", "http://registry.dev.ployman.app/v2/"]
   227→              interval: 30s
   228→              timeout: 10s
   229→              retries: 3
   230→          register: registry_container_result
   231→          retries: 3
   232→          delay: 5
   233→          until: registry_container_result is succeeded
   234→
   235→        - name: Wait for Docker Registry to be ready
   236→          uri:
   237→            url: http://registry.dev.ployman.app/v2/
   238→            method: GET
   239→            status_code: 200
   240→          register: registry_health_check
   241→          retries: 10
   242→          delay: 5
   243→          until: registry_health_check.status == 200
   244→    
   245→    - name: Install Docker Compose
   246→      block:
   247→        - name: Check if Docker Compose is already installed
   248→          stat:
   249→            path: /usr/local/bin/docker-compose
   250→          register: docker_compose_binary
   251→
   252→        - name: Get current Docker Compose version (if installed)
   253→          command: /usr/local/bin/docker-compose version --short
   254→          register: current_docker_compose_version
   255→          changed_when: false
   256→          ignore_errors: true
   257→          when: docker_compose_binary.stat.exists
   258→
   259→        - name: Download Docker Compose
   260→          get_url:
   261→            url: "https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/v{{ docker_compose_version }}/docker-compose-linux-x86_64"
   262→            dest: /usr/local/bin/docker-compose
   263→            mode: '0755'
   264→          when: not docker_compose_binary.stat.exists or docker_compose_version not in (current_docker_compose_version.stdout | default(''))
   265→
   266→    - name: Setup Docker daemon configuration with optional Kontain runtime
   267→      block:
   268→        - name: Check if KVM is available
   269→          stat:
   270→            path: /dev/kvm
   271→          register: kvm_device
   272→
   273→        - name: Install Kontain using official script (if KVM available)
   274→          shell: |
   275→            curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kontainapp/km/current/km-releases/kontain-install.sh | bash
   276→          when: kvm_device.stat.exists
   277→          args:
   278→            creates: /opt/kontain/bin/krun
   279→
   280→        - name: Set KVM availability fact for template
   281→          set_fact:
   282→            kvm_available: "{{ kvm_device.stat.exists }}"
   283→
   284→        - name: Configure Docker daemon using standardized template
   285→          template:
   286→            src: ../../common/templates/docker-daemon.json.j2
   287→            dest: /etc/docker/daemon.json
   288→            backup: true
   289→            owner: root
   290→            group: root
   291→            mode: '0644'
   292→          register: docker_config_result
   293→
   294→        - name: Validate Docker daemon configuration
   295→          command: dockerd --validate --config-file=/etc/docker/daemon.json
   296→          register: docker_config_validation
   297→          failed_when: docker_config_validation.rc != 0
   298→          changed_when: false
   299→
   300→        - name: Restart Docker if configuration changed
   301→          systemd:
   302→            name: docker
   303→            state: restarted
   304→            daemon_reload: true
   305→          when: docker_config_result.changed
   306→          register: docker_restart_result
   307→          retries: 3
   308→          delay: 5
   309→          until: docker_restart_result is succeeded
   310→
   311→        - name: Verify Docker restart was successful
   312→          command: docker info
   313→          retries: 5
   314→          delay: 3
   315→          register: docker_info_verify
   316→          changed_when: false
   317→          when: docker_config_result.changed
   318→
   319→    - name: Install Docker Buildx
   320→      block:
   321→        - name: Create Docker CLI plugins directory
   322→          file:
   323→            path: /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins
   324→            state: directory
   325→            mode: '0755'
   326→
   327→        - name: Check if Docker Buildx is already installed
   328→          stat:
   329→            path: /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-buildx
   330→          register: buildx_binary
   331→
   332→        - name: Get current Docker Buildx version (if installed)
   333→          command: /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-buildx version
   334→          register: current_buildx_version
   335→          changed_when: false
   336→          ignore_errors: true
   337→          when: buildx_binary.stat.exists
   338→
   339→        - name: Download Docker Buildx plugin
   340→          get_url:
   341→            url: "https://github.com/docker/buildx/releases/download/v0.17.1/buildx-v0.17.1.linux-amd64"
   342→            dest: /usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-buildx
   343→            mode: '0755'
   344→          when: not buildx_binary.stat.exists or "0.17.1" not in (current_buildx_version.stdout | default(''))
   345→
   346→        - name: Create Docker config directory for ploy user
   347→          file:
   348→            path: /home/ploy/.docker
   349→            state: directory
   350→            owner: ploy
   351→            group: ploy
   352→            mode: '0755'
   353→
   354→        - name: Configure Docker to use buildx plugin
   355→          copy:
   356→            content: |
   357→              {
   358→                "cliPluginsExtraDirs": ["/usr/local/lib/docker/cli-plugins"]
   359→              }
   360→            dest: /home/ploy/.docker/config.json
   361→            owner: ploy
   362→            group: ploy
   363→            mode: '0644'
   364→
   365→    - name: Install Go
   366→      block:
   367→        - name: Check if Go is already installed
   368→          stat:
   369→            path: /usr/local/go/bin/go
   370→          register: go_binary
   371→
   372→        - name: Get current Go version (if installed)
   373→          command: /usr/local/go/bin/go version
   374→          register: current_go_version
   375→          changed_when: false
   376→          ignore_errors: true
   377→          when: go_binary.stat.exists
   378→
   379→        - name: Download Go
   380→          get_url:
   381→            url: "https://golang.org/dl/go{{ go_version }}.linux-{{ go_arch }}.tar.gz"
   382→            dest: /tmp/go.tar.gz
   383→          when: not go_binary.stat.exists or go_version not in (current_go_version.stdout | default(''))
   384→
   385→        - name: Remove existing Go installation
   386→          file:
   387→            path: /usr/local/go
   388→            state: absent
   389→          when: not go_binary.stat.exists or go_version not in (current_go_version.stdout | default(''))
   390→
   391→        - name: Extract Go
   392→          unarchive:
   393→            src: /tmp/go.tar.gz
   394→            dest: /usr/local
   395→            remote_src: true
   396→          when: not go_binary.stat.exists or go_version not in (current_go_version.stdout | default(''))
   397→
   398→        - name: Configure system PATH with Go
   399→          lineinfile:
   400→            path: /etc/environment
   401→            regexp: '^PATH='
   402→            line: 'PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/games:/snap/bin"'
   403→            create: true
   404→
   405→        - name: Create Go workspace
   406→          file:
   407→            path: /root/go
   408→            state: directory
   409→
   410→    - name: Install QEMU for OSv runtime support
   411→      apt:
   412→        name:
   413→          - qemu-system-x86
   414→          - qemu-utils
   415→          - qemu-system-common
   416→          - libvirt-daemon-system
   417→          - libvirt-clients
   418→        state: present
   419→        update_cache: yes
   420→
   421→    - name: Install Python3 and pip
   422→      apt:
   423→        name:
   424→          - python3
   425→          - python3-pip
   426→          - python3-venv
   427→        state: present
   428→
   429→    - name: Install Java and build tools for ARF
   430→      apt:
   431→        name:
   432→          - openjdk-17-jdk
   433→          - maven
   434→          - gradle
   435→        state: present
   436→
   437→    - name: Set JAVA_HOME environment variable
   438→      lineinfile:
   439→        path: /etc/environment
   440→        regexp: '^JAVA_HOME='
   441→        line: 'JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64'
   442→        create: true
   443→
   444→    - name: Install OpenRewrite Maven plugin (for ARF integration)
   445→      block:
   446→        - name: Set OpenRewrite version
   447→          set_fact:
   448→            openrewrite_version: "8.60.0"
   449→
   450→        - name: Check if OpenRewrite Maven plugin exists
   451→          stat:
   452→            path: /usr/local/bin/rewrite-maven.jar
   453→          register: openrewrite_jar
   454→
   455→        - name: Download OpenRewrite Maven plugin
   456→          get_url:
   457→            url: "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/openrewrite/rewrite-maven/{{ openrewrite_version }}/rewrite-maven-{{ openrewrite_version }}.jar"
   458→            dest: /usr/local/bin/rewrite-maven.jar
   459→            mode: '0644'
   460→            force: no  # Don't re-download if already exists
   461→      ignore_errors: true
   462→
   463→    - name: Create OpenRewrite CLI wrapper script for Maven-based transformations
   464→      copy:
   465→        content: |
   466→          #!/bin/bash
   467→          # OpenRewrite CLI wrapper for ARF integration
   468→          # Uses Maven plugin for code transformations
   469→          if [ -f pom.xml ]; then
   470→            mvn org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven:8.60.0:run -Drewrite.recipeArtifactCoordinates=org.openrewrite:rewrite-java -Drewrite.activeRecipes="$1"
   471→          else
   472→            echo "Error: Maven project (pom.xml) required for OpenRewrite transformations"
   473→            exit 1
   474→          fi
   475→        dest: /usr/local/bin/rewrite
   476→        mode: '0755'
   477→
   478→    - name: Install PostgreSQL for ARF learning database
   479→      apt:
   480→        name:
   481→          - postgresql
   482→          - postgresql-contrib
   483→          - postgresql-client
   484→          - libpq-dev
   485→          - python3-psycopg2
   486→        state: present
   487→
   488→    - name: Start and enable PostgreSQL
   489→      systemd:
   490→        name: postgresql
   491→        state: started
   492→        enabled: true
   493→
   494→    - name: Create ARF database user
   495→      become_user: postgres
   496→      postgresql_user:
   497→        name: ploy
   498→        password: "{{ arf_db_password | default('arf_dev_password') }}"
   499→        state: present
   500→
   501→    - name: Create ARF learning database
   502→      become_user: postgres
   503→      postgresql_db:
   504→        name: arf_learning
   505→        owner: ploy
   506→        state: present
   507→
   508→    - name: Grant all privileges on ARF database to ploy user
   509→      become_user: postgres
   510→      postgresql_privs:
   511→        db: arf_learning
   512→        privs: ALL
   513→        type: database
   514→        role: ploy
   515→        state: present
   516→
   517→    - name: Install tree-sitter CLI for multi-language AST parsing
   518→      block:
   519→        - name: Check if tree-sitter is installed
   520→          stat:
   521→            path: /usr/local/bin/tree-sitter
   522→          register: tree_sitter_binary
   523→
   524→        - name: Download tree-sitter CLI
   525→          get_url:
   526→            url: "https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter/releases/download/v{{ tree_sitter_version }}/tree-sitter-linux-x64.gz"
   527→            dest: /tmp/tree-sitter.gz
   528→          vars:
   529→            tree_sitter_version: "0.20.8"
   530→          when: not tree_sitter_binary.stat.exists
   531→
   532→        - name: Extract tree-sitter CLI
   533→          shell: |
   534→            gunzip /tmp/tree-sitter.gz
   535→            mv /tmp/tree-sitter /usr/local/bin/tree-sitter
   536→            chmod +x /usr/local/bin/tree-sitter
   537→          when: not tree_sitter_binary.stat.exists
   538→
   539→        - name: Install Node.js first for npm commands
   540→          shell: |
   541→            curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash -
   542→            apt-get install -y nodejs
   543→          args:
   544→            creates: /usr/bin/node
   545→          
   546→        - name: Install tree-sitter language parsers
   547→          npm:
   548→            name: "{{ item }}"
   549→            global: true
   550→            state: latest
   551→          loop:
   552→            - tree-sitter-cli
   553→            - tree-sitter-java
   554→            - tree-sitter-javascript
   555→            - tree-sitter-typescript
   556→            - tree-sitter-python
   557→            - tree-sitter-go
   558→            - tree-sitter-rust
   559→            - tree-sitter-c
   560→            - tree-sitter-cpp
   561→
   562→    - name: Install LLM API dependencies
   563→      block:
   564→        - name: Install critical LLM packages
   565→          pip:
   566→            name:
   567→              - openai>=1.0.0
   568→              - anthropic>=0.7.0
   569→              - requests>=2.28.0
   570→              - tiktoken>=0.5.0
   571→            state: present
   572→            executable: pip3
   573→            extra_args: --break-system-packages
   574→          async: 300  # 5 minutes max
   575→          poll: 15    # Check every 15 seconds
   576→
   577→        - name: Install database packages
   578→          pip:
   579→            name:
   580→              - redis>=4.5.0
   581→              - sqlalchemy>=2.0.0
   582→              - psycopg2-binary>=2.9.0
   583→            state: present
   584→            executable: pip3
   585→            extra_args: --break-system-packages
   586→          async: 300
   587→          poll: 15
   588→
   589→        - name: Install scientific packages
   590→          pip:
   591→            name:
   592→              - numpy>=1.24.0
   593→              - scipy>=1.10.0
   594→            state: present
   595→            executable: pip3
   596→            extra_args: --break-system-packages
   597→          async: 600  # 10 minutes for scientific packages
   598→          poll: 30
   599→      rescue:
   600→        - name: Handle pip installation failure
   601→          debug:
   602→            msg: "Some Python packages failed to install. ARF functionality may be limited."
   603→
   604→    # Static Analysis Phase 2: Python Analysis Tools
   605→    - name: Install Python static analysis tools
   606→      pip:
   607→        name:
   608→          - pylint>=3.0.0
   609→          - mypy>=1.5.0
   610→          - black>=23.0.0
   611→          - isort>=5.12.0
   612→          - flake8>=6.0.0
   613→          - pylint-django>=2.5.0
   614→          - pylint-flask>=0.6
   615→        state: present
   616→        executable: pip3
   617→        extra_args: --break-system-packages
   618→      ignore_errors: true  # Ignore conflicts with system packages
   619→
   620→    # ARF Phase 4: Security & Production Hardening Dependencies
   621→    - name: Install security scanning dependencies
   622→      apt:
   623→        name:
   624→          - libssl-dev
   625→          - libffi-dev
   626→          - libxml2-dev
   627→          - libxslt1-dev
   628→          - zlib1g-dev
   629→          - libjpeg-dev
   630→          - libpng-dev
   631→          - build-essential
   632→          - pkg-config

  1033→        - name: Create ARF Phase 3 validation tools

  1035→            content: |
  1036→              #!/bin/bash
  1037→              # ARF Phase 3 Validation Suite
  1038→              
  1039→              echo "🔍 ARF Phase 3 Infrastructure Validation"
  1040→              echo "========================================"
  1041→              echo ""
  1042→              
  1043→              # Check database connectivity
  1044→              echo "Checking PostgreSQL connection..."
  1045→              if pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  1046→                  echo "✅ PostgreSQL: Ready"
  1047→              else
  1048→                  echo "❌ PostgreSQL: Not available"
  1049→              fi
  1050→

  1053→              if redis-cli ping > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  1054→                  echo "✅ Redis: Ready"
  1055→              else
  1056→                  echo "❌ Redis: Not available"
  1057→              fi
  1058→              
  1059→              # Check tree-sitter installation
  1060→              echo "Checking tree-sitter installation..."
  1061→              if command -v tree-sitter >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1062→                  echo "✅ Tree-sitter: $(tree-sitter --version)"
  1063→              else
  1064→                  echo "❌ Tree-sitter: Not installed"
  1065→              fi
  1066→              
  1067→              # Check language parsers
  1068→              echo "Checking language parsers..."
  1069→              parser_count=0
  1070→              for parser in tree-sitter-java tree-sitter-javascript tree-sitter-python tree-sitter-go; do
  1071→                  if npm list -g "$parser" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1072→                      parser_count=$((parser_count + 1))

  1074→              done
  1075→              echo "✅ Language parsers: $parser_count/4 installed"

  1079→              python_deps=0

  1083→                  fi

  1089→              if consul kv get ploy/arf/models >/dev/null 2>&1; then

  1091→                  echo "✅ LLM models registered: $model_count"

  1607→              ignore_errors: true
  1608→
  1609→            - name: Add wasm32-wasip1 target (new WASI name)

  1611→              when: not rustup_binary.stat.exists

  1613→            - name: Add wasm32-unknown-unknown target (browser WASM)

  1615→              when: not rustup_binary.stat.exists

  1621→                - wasm-bindgen-cli  # For JavaScript bindings

  1648→        - name: Install Emscripten toolchain

  1674→        - name: Update ploy user environment for WASM development

  1688→
  1689→    - name: Clean up conflicting environment variables from /etc/environment
